chunks.text: EU AI Act Article 5 concerns prohibited artificial intelligence practices including unacceptable risk AI systems and certain manipulative or exploitative AI practices.
EU AI Act Article 6 concerns high-risk AI systems and classification rules for regulated artificial intelligence applications.
47 U.S.C. Section 230 concerns protection for interactive computer services and platform liability for third party content under United States internet law.
COPPA concerns online privacy protection for children and requirements for operators collecting personal information from children.
This generic legal text discusses official rules, compliance obligations, governance procedures, and regulatory interpretation without belonging to a specific supported corpus.
